description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to master branch and tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and linter. The build job runs on a matrix of Linux, macOS, and Windows with different compilers and shells, installing dependencies, checking out code, configuring, building, testing, installing, and uploading AppImages. The linter job runs on ubuntu-24.04 with a matrix of Cppcheck and Clang-Tidy, installing dependencies, checking out code, configuring, and running linter tools.
